CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Continued To Oct-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT KISS, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to plead facts that establish a basis for a duty owed to plaintiff; simply being handicapped is not a sufficient basis. Plaintiff must also allege facts that establish a basis for the contention that plaintiff had responsibility for the area where plaintiff slipped. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT KISS, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted with 10 days leave to amend for the reasons stated in connection with the demurrer. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
